framework.name: Token Exchange for Privilege Downscoping
framework.description: Use OAuth token exchange (RFC 8693) to convert an access token with broad scopes into a new token with narrower scopes when calling less-trusted downstream services. The forwarding service acts as an OAuth client, requesting a new token with reduced privileges while preserving user identity and other claims. Critical for multi-agent systems where one agent delegates to another with restricted capabilities.
framework.raw_quote: The following flow shows the use of token exchange to downscope an access token when an orders API calls a shipping API. The only scopes left in the access token are those that the shipping API needs.
